pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.

.drone.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the Docker image used for the commit stage to version 3.0.0 to support the new Java version.
Upgrade the Docker image used for the integration test stage to version 3.0.0 to support the new Java version.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from Eclipse Temurin 11 to Eclipse Temurin 17 Alpine to align with the target JDK version.
Update user and group creation commands to use Alpine Linux compatible flags (-S, -g, -u, -G) instead of Debian-style flags.
